ai_assistance: AI-assisted implementation was used to draft this runner and cards; result statuses come from deterministic runner gates.
allowed_claim_sentence: Under HEADROOM_SEMANTIC_FIDELITY_D004, synthetic structured log semantic gate did not satisfy the combined semantic-field and >=60% token-reduction gate.
baseline_control_summary: Original and Headroom-compressed contexts were sent to the same local Ollama model with temperature 0; a deterministic structured-field checker evaluated semantic equivalence.
claim_boundary: This card checks same-meaning preservation only through predeclared structured fields, not literal answer equality. It covers one local Ollama model and one synthetic fixture family; it does not generalize to all prompts, models, proxy deployments or CCR-enabled workflows.
known_limitations: Single local operator and single Ollama model.
Semantic equivalence is restricted to predeclared structured fields.
Raw prompts and answers are intentionally not committed.
manual_review: The operator reviewed the deterministic semantic-field gate and confirmed this card must not be read as an exact-string test.
official_source_name: Headroom v0.27.0 public repository and package
raw_payload_manifest: No raw prompts, full synthetic fixture bodies, private transcripts, credentials, serial number, hardware UUID or provisioning UDID committed; only sanitized hash/count/boolean summaries are public.
source_rights_note: Headroom public repository is Apache-2.0; runtime fixtures are synthetic and generated locally; no private payloads committed.

visual_summary.allowed_claim_sentence: Under HEADROOM_SEMANTIC_FIDELITY_D004, synthetic structured log semantic gate did not satisfy the combined semantic-field and >=60% token-reduction gate.
visual_summary.controls_and_gate: local Ollama semantic-field gate plus token-reduction threshold
visual_summary.target_definition: same meaning with >=60% fewer input tokens
